description: The Sales Director has decided to discontinue the weekly Sales Pipeline Sync meetings. The sales team has transitioned to asynchronous reporting, so this recurring sync is no longer needed. Delete the calendar event named 'Sales Pipeline Sync' from the Odoo Calendar. This event is scheduled on a Friday in the upcoming week, from 3:00 PM to 4:00 PM, in the Sales Room, with attendees Carol Martinez, Bob Williams, and Isabel Santos. After completion, the 'Sales Pipeline Sync' event should no longer exist in the calendar.
